paths*.title: Site paths
paths*.description: Specifies which path to allow comments on. The "paths*" name means glob patterns can be used.

cache.title: Cache pending comments
cache.description: Can be temporarily fetched, e.g. via front end javascript.
cache.$comment: the pending comments cache is very unstable still. TODO: some kind of basic, automatic moderation to flag for spam. TODO: document better exactly how much time the cache makes comments available (72 hours is reasonable).

md_to_html.title: Markdown to HTML conversion
md_to_html.description: Converts markdown syntax to HTML tags.
md_to_html.$comment: See also `sanitize_html`. TODO: remove this config variable. If people don't want MD -> HTML conversion they can just not use the converted HTML.

sanitize_html.title: Sanitize HTML
sanitize_html.description: Nothing from the outside world should be trusted, especially HTML in comments. Only disable this if you reall know what you're doing.

allow_tags.title: HTML Tags to allow
allow_tags.description: Only tags listed here will be allowed by the HTML sanitizer.

$comment_sources.$comment: TODO: remove this. There are better ways to derive this.
